<@&1166257943742787615>

为什么服务器上会有这些角色名称？我不明白“术士”、“幽灵”、“诅咒”和“凡人”与《忘卻前夜》有什么关系？这个服务器现在变成了修仙网文吗？凡人和术士和洛夫克拉夫特有什么关系？不仅如此，为什么服务器中要根据发言频率来设置等级？就因为有人不断刷屏，他们在用户列表中排名更高，看起来好像更重要？当新玩家进入时，他们看到刷屏者在用户列表中排名较高，并且带有特别的称号，这样他们就会认为这些刷屏者是重要人物。这对于一个官方支持的团体来说，不是非常尴尬吗？

There is a bug in the English localization with a description of Caren's ult. My friend (the first 3 screenshots) does not have Caren, but the e3 effect is displayed, and for me, at e0 (4-5 screen), Karen does not have this effect (although the character himself is present).
I checked in battle, and there really is no effect.

Do I understand that right, the new season pass premium gives triple daily exp, ergo 1500 EXP. But the bonus EXP from silver prime (15,30,45% etc) doesnt apply because in the description it states (only the strongest effect applies) so that means only the "200%" (Triple EXP) of the new premium pass? Or do actually both take effect?
thread_title: Bonus EXP Interaction between new Premium Pass Triple EXP and Silver Prime Bonus EXP

content:
In the main story, we first meet Goliath in the new world when the Seafarers try to invade Necrovia.

However, the dialogue between Goliath and the Keeper suggests that they met before, which makes it confusing because again, this should be the first time we are meeting him in this world.

I asked other players and they said this was because we've already met Goliath in the story for the 1.5 anniversary raid event.

I wasn't able to read that event story and I'm sure new players will also be unable to read it because it's not archived.

So now, this leaves us this dialogue in the main story with zero context from the main story itself.

Please considering editing this dialogue to make it more consistent with the main story.
thread_title: Goliath's interaction with the Keeper in Arc 2 Chapter 3 is inconsistent with the main story
